q: How many customers are from the US?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE country = 'US'

q: What is the name of the most expensive product?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'paid'

q: What is the total revenue (quantity times price) from paid orders?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'paid'

q: Which customer placed the most orders? Return their name.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

q: How many products are in the 'film' category?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE category = 'film'

q: List the distinct countries customers are from.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM customers ORDER BY country

q: What is the total quantity sold of the product named 'Cinestill 800T'?
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.name = 'Cinestill 800T'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'refunded'

q: What is the average product price?
Which product category has the highest total of product prices?
gold_sql: SELECT category FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(price) DESC LIMIT 1

q: How many customers signed up in March 2025?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE signup_date LIKE '2025-03%'
